title: For Pure, Uncomplicated Joy
scripture_text: In your presence there is fullness of joy; at your right hand are pleasures forevermore.
reflection: Joy is not the absence of sorrow. It is the presence of something larger than sorrow. The Lord is that larger thing.
body:
Something made you smile today. You did not earn it. You did not plan it. It just arrived, like sunlight through a window.

This is what the Bible means by joy. Not the emotion you can manufacture. The emotion that arrives unbidden, because something or someone has touched the real you, the one beneath the worry and the schedule and the small, hard things.

God is the source of that. He is in the smile. He is in the sunlight. He is the sunlight.

Receive it. Do not rush past it. Do not turn it into a project. Just stand in it. Just let it be.
prayer: Lord, thank You for joy. The unexpected, unearned kind. The kind that finds me. Amen.
